---
title: "NWSL Kickoff Times and Streaming Info"
---

## March 

### Friday, March 20

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Approx. Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Orlando | Denver | 8:00/**8:08 PM ET** | [Victory+](https://victoryplus.com/) |
| Louisville |Washington| 8:00/**8:08 PM ET** | [Victory+](https://victoryplus.com/)|
| Portland |Seattle| 10:00/**10:10 PM ET** | [Prime Video](http://www.amazon.com/nwsl)|

: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}

### Saturday, March 21

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Actual Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Houston | Boston | 4:00/**4:04 PM ET** | [ION](https://www.ionnwsl.com/) |
| NJ/NY |North Carolina| 6:30/**6:34 PM ET** | [ION](https://www.ionnwsl.com/)|
| Bay |Angel City| 8:45/**8:49 PM ET** | [ION](https://www.ionnwsl.com/)|

: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}

### Sunday, March 22

|**Home**|**Away**|**Announced/Actual Kickoff Time**|**Stream**|
|--------|---------|----------------------|---------|
| Chicago | Kansas City | 2:15/**2:22 PM ET** | [ESPN2](https://plus.espn.com/), [ESPN app](https://plus.espn.com/) |
| Utah Royals |San Diego| 7:00/**7:08 PM ET** | [Victory+](https://victoryplus.com/)|

: {tbl-colwidths="[66,66,80,80]"}

*Kickoff times are approximate based on historical trends. On the national channels (i.e., ABC, CBS, etc.), there is always the risk of kickoff time shifting to accomodate previous programs running late. 

## FAQs

**What is NWSL+?**

-   NWSL+ is a digital streaming service that gives fans access to live NWSL games, match recaps, and highlights. It's a free service available online, and on the NWSL+ app on Apple TV, Fire TV, and Roku. Learn more [here](https://www.nwslsoccer.com/plus).

**What is Victory+?**

-   Victory+ is the newest streaming partner of the NWSL. It's a free streaming service that allows for live game streaming and on-demand sports entertainment for free across major platforms. Access it [here](https://victoryplus.com/).
-   After you've created a [Victory+ account](https://victoryplus.com/), you can download the Victory+ app on your smart TV and pair your account via this [link](victoryplus.com/settings/pair).
-   More information can also be found on the [National Women's Soccer League's Victory+ FAQ site](https://www.nwslsoccer.com/news/victory-faq-everything-nwsl-fans-need-to-know-about-the-free-streaming-platform).


This site was created by Arianna D. Cascone. If you notice any issues, please feel free to send me an email or file an issue on GitHub using the buttons below! 

{{< pagebreak >}}

```{=html}
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary" href="https://bsky.app/profile/casconearianna.bsky.social" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-clouds" style='color:#005b96' role='img' aria-label='Bluesky'></i>
</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary", href="mailto:ariannacascone4@gmail.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope" style='color:#005b96' role='img' aria-label='email'></i>
</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary", href="https://github.com/adcascone" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-github" style='color:#005b96' role='img' aria-label='Github'></i>
</a>
<a class="btn btn-outline-primary", href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/arianna-d-cascone/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin" style='color:#005b96' role='img' aria-label='LinkedIn'></i>
</a>
```

<br><br><br><br><br><br> [Website inspired by: <https://mlskickofftimes.com/>]{style="font-size:.5;"}.
